---
title: "Clustering I"
subtitle: "k-means and cluster evaluation"
date: "Oct 9, 2026"
date-format: long
---

k-means as an EM-style algorithm; choosing k; silhouette scores and gap statistics; what cluster evaluation actually tells you.

📖 **Assigned reading:** ISLR §10.3

---

## 📊 Slides

- 🖥️ [Clean slides](slides_clean.pdf)

## 📚 Readings

- 📄 [Moraru et al. (2025)](readings/Moraru et al. (2025).pdf)
- 📄 [Prabakaran et al. (2019)](readings/Prabakaran et al. (2019).pdf)

## 🧪 Lab

In-class walkthrough — open the rendered lab in a new tab. The R Markdown source is provided so you can run the code yourself in RStudio.

- 🧪 [class7 lab1 (HTML)](code/class7_lab1.html){target="_blank"}
- 🧪 [lab1 (HTML)](code/lab1.html){target="_blank"}
- 📝 [Lab source (lab1.Rmd)](code/lab1.Rmd)

## 💻 Code

**Figure scripts** — reproduce each figure from the slides:

- 📈 [fig1.R](code/fig1.R)
- 📈 [fig2.R](code/fig2.R)

## 🗂️ Data

- 📊 [penguins.csv](data/penguins.csv)
